ground_truth.title: The 5 Cheapest Website Builders in 2026 & Extra Saving Hacks
ground_truth.author: Emma Ryan
ground_truth.main_content: Our March 2025 website builder testing found Hostinger to be the cheapest website builder, with plans starting from just $2.99 per month. Using a budget-friendly builder significantly reduces overhead costs, but you don't have to sacrifice quality for price. In this guide, I'll walk you through each of our top-rated cheap website builders and share my recommendations, based on my own hands-on testing and more than 300 hours of research by our expert team. The Cheapest Website Builders of 2025 are: Hostinger ($2.99) – Best site speed, Shopify ($5 Shopify Starter) – Best for online stores, Pixpa ($4.80) – Best for portfolios, GoDaddy ($10.99) – Best for beginners, Squarespace ($14.40 with code WBE10) – Best for creatives. When paying for a website builder subscription in bulk, you'll often receive a heavily discounted introductory offer. Hostinger has the cheapest plans with the most long-term savings, but you'll have to pay for two years upfront to make the most of this. Use code "WBE10" to save 10% on Squarespace's plans. You can get Shopify's introductory offer on a pay-as-you-go plan, but be aware that the offer only lasts three months. To avoid being caught off guard by price hikes, be aware of the length of any introductory offers and the renewal fees before subscribing. Hostinger is the most affordable website builder on this list, with plans starting from $2.99 per month. It's an ideal option for beginners and small business owners who want to make use of its user-friendly drag-and-drop editor and ever-growing suite of AI tools. However, while its AI tools might be advanced, it lacks other basic functionality. For example, there's no app store or email marketing features – if these are essential for your site, Squarespace and Shopify will give you access to better tools. Hostinger runs limited student discounts through its partner platform, Student Beans. Plus, users who sign up for a 48-month term of either plan can take advantage of Hostinger's introductory deal. This gives you three months free, a year's free domain, and a heavily discounted monthly price. Premium Website Builder: $2.99 per month, Business Website Builder: $3.99 per month. After your first two years are up, you'll be charged the standard monthly price. Hostinger doesn't charge any transaction fees on its ecommerce plan, making it the most affordable entry into selling online. Both of Hostinger's plans are very affordable, and with only a $1 price difference between them, it's risk-free to upgrade or downgrade as you see fit. Shopify is our top-rated ecommerce website builder, offering an affordable $5 per month Starter plan – though its actual website builder plans are much more expensive. Shopify's Starter plan enables you to sell on social media, and includes basic inventory management tools, analytics to monitor selling, and a custom Linkpop page to drive customers to products. However, it doesn't include the ability to build an ecommerce website. Besides the limited $5 per month Shopify Starter plan, there are three core premium plans: Basic at $29 per month, Grow at $79 per month, and Advanced at $299 per month. Shopify doesn't have a long term discount for new starters like other options on this list, but it has a three-day free trial and you can get your first three months for just $1.
with: Hostinger to be the cheapest website builder, with plans starting from just $2.99 per month
Use code "WBE10" to save 10% on Squarespace's plans
Shopify's Starter plan enables you to sell on social media (such as Instagram and WhatsApp)
Hostinger doesn't charge any transaction fees on its ecommerce plan, making it the most affordable entry into selling online
I really enjoyed setting up a website with Hostinger because of its AI-powered builder and tools
